arts.sum: Andoni Iraola’s relationship with Kepa Arrizabalaga could help Bournemouth to sign the Chelsea goalkeeper on a permanent basis in the summer. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who report that Bournemouth have already decided to make an offer for the goalkeeper at the end of his loan deal.
